# ringStyle

**Instance Property**

The style of the progress ring.

## Declaration

```swift
var ringStyle: CLKComplicationRingStyle { get set }
```

## Setting the Complication Data

- **fillFraction**: The fraction of the ring to fill.
- **imageProvider**: The image to display in the complication.
